description: Mock dataset of 50 startup employee salaries for 2024. Distribution is intentionally skewed — the majority of staff earn modest wages while a small group of founders and executives earn disproportionately large compensation packages.
note: Salaries span from entry-level operations staff ($38k) up to the founding CEO ($11.5M including equity valuation). The top 5 earners are C-level executives, reflecting the extreme pay disparity common in early-stage tech startups.
